race.comment: LUCKY COMPASS (8) resumes. Wasn't far away at last run before a break, finishing fourth over 1625m at Werribee ten weeks ago. Should have residual fitness and has won here, which is key. Go close in a suitable race. EX MACHINA (1) has switched yards since finishing eighth two months ago over 1590m at Wangaratta. Kept ticking over with a recent placing in a Pakenham Synthetic trial. Worth serious consideration. KING ALLA (2) placed two starts ago at Werribee but could only manage 13th last time, beaten 11 lengths, over 1620m on turf at Donald. First try on synthetic today and is in the mix. MASTER POLANSKI (5) followed an unplaced effort two starts back with a second last start over 1600m at Bairnsdale. Can do better.
